title: Add a necklace to Stitch character in the 3D scene

requirements.summary: Add a 3D necklace accessory to the Stitch character in FrogScene.tsx with a looping chain/band around the neck and a pendant element, matching Stitch's cartoon proportions and color palette
acceptanceCriteria: A necklace geometry is visible around Stitch's neck in the 3D scene
The necklace consists of at least a looping band or chain element around the neck and a small pendant or decorative element
The necklace is correctly positioned relative to Stitch's neck and scales appropriately with the character
The necklace color/material fits Stitch's cartoon aesthetic (e.g., gold, silver, or matching palette)
The necklace does not clip through or obscure Stitch's face or body in a distracting way
The necklace moves with Stitch during animations (jump/squash-stretch)

file_operations.description: Add a StitchNecklace sub-component within the Stitch character group that renders a 3D necklace consisting of a torus or curved chain looping around the neck and a small sphere or tetrahedron pendant hanging from the front. Position the necklace relative to Stitch's neck geometry, apply a metallic material (e.g., gold color using MeshStandardMaterial), and ensure the necklace group inherits the same scale and animation transformations as Stitch so it moves with the jump and squash-stretch animations. Follow the existing StitchGlasses sub-component pattern for structure and naming consistency.
